description:
## What

Create the library registry foundation that allows the admin dashboard to track multiple web component libraries.

## Deliverables

1. **library-registry.ts** in apps/admin/src/lib — TypeScript types and CRUD utilities:
   - LibraryEntry interface with fields: id, name, source (local|cdn|npm), cemPath (for local), packageName (for cdn/npm), version (for cdn/npm), prefix (e.g. "hx-", "sl-"), lastScored, componentCount, isDefault
   - getRegistry() — reads JSON, returns LibraryEntry array
   - addLibrary(entry) — validates, writes, returns entry with generated ID
   - updateLibrary(id, partial) — partial update
   - removeLibrary(id) — delete (cannot remove default)
   - getLibrary(id) — single entry lookup
   - getDefaultLibrary() — returns entry with isDefault true

2. **library-registry.json** in apps/admin/src/data — JSON file with default entry for hx-library (local source, prefix "hx-", isDefault true)

3. **library-registry.test.ts** in apps/admin/src/lib — Tests for all CRUD operations plus validation (no duplicate IDs, prefix format, source-specific required fields)

## Acceptance Criteria

- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
- All tests pass
- Adding a CDN library requires packageName; adding a local library requires cemPath
- Cannot delete the default library
- Registry file is gitignored (each install has its own libraries)
title: M1: Library Registry — Data Model, JSON Store & CRUD Utilities
